_comment: A-Wiki render-html surface registry. Add a new surface = add one template file + one entry here. No core renderer change needed.

scouter.title: Model Scouter — Free-Model Roster
scouter.description: Sortable/filterable comparison of scouted free/cheap models

report.title: Engineering Report
report.description: Post-mortem / code-review with severity badges, diffs, and timeline

health.title: A-Wiki Health Digest
health.description: Dashboard of wiki health checks, stats, and TODOs

graph.title: A-Wiki Knowledge Graph
graph.description: Interactive force-directed view of wiki nodes and links

plan.title: A-Wiki Plan Viewer
plan.description: Interactive data-journalist view of a plan .md file — progressive disclosure, phase approval cards, round-trip JSON decision to agent
